title: 菊花賞の後に・フクキタル、開☆眼

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Praise be! Grace has granted me fortune again on
the chrysanthemum stage!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Did you see how my lucky stride blew right past
all the other runners? I didn't even recognize
myself!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All the luck I've gathered has set something
aflame within me... Just what is becoming of me?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! There's no other explanation! I could
never run like that normally.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Then, today I must be the incarnation of
happiness! Just like a plump, happy Buddha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Mwahahaha! This is the power of the gods! Luck
will take me to the highest peaks!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If we simply ride this cresting wave of fortune, our
future will certainly be assured!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer, what shall our next challenge
be?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Shall we let our momentum carry us forward,
smashing our way right through the Japan Cup
and the Arima Kinen?!
choice_data_list: I-I don't think that's in the cards just yet...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Now that I've been reborn, those races are
practically a walk in the park.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: If not there, where do we go?
choice_data_list: Let's shoot for next year's Kinko Sho!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Kinko Sho... Isn't that next spring? That's
pretty far off...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Very well! This year's accomplishments will just
have to satisfy me for now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a hunch, I decide to give us a little breathing
room. Matikanefukukitaru's behavior is beginning
to concern me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eh? What do you mean? I've reached
enlightenment. I'm doing much better than simply
"okay."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm off for my interview. I wonder what I
should say... Maybe I'll tell them about meeting
the gods! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She skips away with an uncharacteristically
exaggerated spring in her step,

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's actions only grow stranger
afterwards.
